svg.title: Movie Recommendation System — Big Data Architecture
svg.desc: End-to-end architecture from data ingestion through Spark processing to dashboard output

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me about MovieLens and TMDB datasets for movie recommendations')
sendPrompt('How is the TMDB API used in a movie recommendation system?')
sendPrompt('How is Kafka used for streaming user click events in recommendations?')
sendPrompt('What user behavior data is collected for movie recommendations?')
sendPrompt('Explain HDFS data lake architecture for movie data storage')
sendPrompt('What is Apache Hive and how is it used to structure movie data?')
sendPrompt('How does Apache Kafka buffer streaming data before Spark processing?')
sendPrompt('What is a feature store and how is it used for recommendation models?')
sendPrompt('How does Spark ALS collaborative filtering work for movie recommendations?')
sendPrompt('How does content-based filtering with TF-IDF and movie genres work in Spark?')
sendPrompt('What is Spark Streaming and how is it used for real-time recommendations?')
sendPrompt('How does a hybrid ensemble model combine collaborative and content-based filtering?')
sendPrompt('How does a Redis cache serve movie recommendations at low latency?')
sendPrompt('How do you build a REST API for serving movie recommendations with FastAPI?')
sendPrompt('How is Apache Solr or Elasticsearch used for movie search in a recommendation system?')
sendPrompt('How does MLflow model registry manage recommendation model versioning?')
sendPrompt('What metrics and charts should be in a movie recommendation system dashboard?')
g.text: Streamlit / Dash — KPIs, charts, recommendation explorer
